title: dortmanna trigona var. terminalis
intro: Dortmanna trigona var. terminalis, also known as the Dortmann's trigone or simply terminalis, is a variety of the Dortmanna trigona plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting healing, as well as its use as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs and airways. Dortmanna trigona var. terminalis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
